zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Stafford於1265年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，她的父親Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton29歲，母親Helisant De Bohun16歲。她和Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1293年在她的家鄉享年28歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Stafford was born in 1265, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, was 29 and her mother, Helisant De Bohun, was 16. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley. She died in 1293, in her hometown, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Stafford est née en 1265, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Helisant De Bohun, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley. Elle est décédée en 1293, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Stafford 1265 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton 29 und ihre Mutter Helisant De Bohun 16. Sie hatte mit Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1293 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley. Morì nel 1293, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Stafford(이)가 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helisant De Bohun(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Stafford родилась в 1265 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Helisant De Bohun, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Sir William Bagot, Lord of Bromley. Она умерла в 1293 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет.
